name: AgDel Trader Bot
description: CxU-driven autonomous trading agent for ETH-USD on Hyperliquid. Uses Context Units as an active learning knowledge repository to evolve trading strategies through structured reflection, regime classification, and signal quality assessment.

tabs.label: Trading
tabs.description: Live market view with regime-aware CxU-driven decisions

tabs.label: Signals
tabs.description: Dual signal feeds: AGDEL marketplace + direct signal bot

tabs.label: Knowledge
tabs.description: CxU knowledge base — the agent's evolving brain

tabs.label: Trades
tabs.description: Trade history with full CxU citation chain

tabs.label: Reflection
tabs.description: Learning loop: CxU evolution, before/after performance

axioms.description: Core trading truths validated through experience. Human-locked.
examples: Fees kill: minimum $13 round-trip edge required per trade
Hold is correct 80% of the time

regime_models.description: Market regime definitions and classification criteria. Human-locked.
examples: Trending: sustained directional, higher highs/lows, 30-40% of time

playbooks.description: Strategy parameters per regime. Agent-adjustable within bounds.
examples: Ranging playbook: mean-revert, max size, 2-3 trades/day

learnings.description: Observed patterns from trade outcomes. Agent-created, human-reviewable.

agdelMarketplace.description: Selective, high-quality purchased signals for confirming big trades

signalBot.description: High-volume direct feed (~500 signals/tick) for insights and signal quality assessment

agents.name: Regime Classifier
agents.description: Classifies current market regime using CxU-defined criteria

agents.name: Signal Assessor
agents.description: Evaluates incoming signals against CxU-stored quality ratings per regime

agents.name: Trade Decider
agents.description: Makes trade decisions by assembling axiom + playbook + signal CxUs

agents.name: Reflector
agents.description: Post-trade analysis — proposes CxU updates with evidence and version tracking
